thesis_role: Ordinary-branch architecture for stable throughflow sections
required_gates: Re; Pr; Gr; Gr_star; Ri; Ra; Gz; reset distances; reverse_area_fraction; reverse_mass_fraction; pressure and heat residuals
allowed_claim: A branch may use source-bounded developing friction or heat-transfer candidates only after its single-stream and source-envelope gates pass.
blocked_or_future_condition: Persistent exchange, high recirculation, stratification, unrecovered disturbance, or residual failure sends the row to MF-02/MF-04 or diagnostic status.
target_chapter: Ch. 5 model forms; Ch. 8 model-form comparison

thesis_role: Naming and extraction rule for corners, bends, reducers, tees, junctions, or close-coupled clusters
required_gates: component isolation; pressure basis; velocity basis; recovery diagnostics; reverse metrics; same-QOI UQ
allowed_claim: Use K_section or K_cluster when the extraction domain is a section or close-coupled cluster; component_K requires isolation and recovery.
blocked_or_future_condition: Negative net branch flow, near-zero velocity basis, or persistent exchange blocks ordinary scalar K admission.
target_chapter: Ch. 4 pressure reduction; Ch. 6 closure admission
board_status: supporting rows complete for fitting inventory and pressure basis; standardization rows remain open

thesis_role: Architecture only if a discrete modeled branch changes net sign or path pressure reversal is topology-resolved
required_gates: signed mdot each branch; path pressure reversal; topology consistency; mass conservation; hysteresis check
allowed_claim: Signed-flow network is a candidate only for net branch reversal, not local cross-sectional exchange.
blocked_or_future_condition: If simultaneous forward/reverse flow occurs inside one section while net flow stays positive, hand to MF-04.
target_chapter: Ch. 5 candidate forms; Ch. 9 future work

thesis_role: Preferred reduced architecture for persistent local exchange where one bulk state fails
required_gates: persistent F_A/F_m; coherent recirculation volume; residence time; exchange flux; pressure/energy residuals; held-out validation
allowed_claim: Use as a thesis model-form lane with dry contract fields, not as an admitted calibrated closure.
blocked_or_future_condition: No Fluid/API implementation or coefficient calibration is allowed from the writing row.
target_chapter: Ch. 5 model forms; Ch. 7 upcomer recirculation; Ch. 9 future work

thesis_role: Future transient lane for repeatable positive-mean periodic fitting response
required_gates: periodicity; positive mean; no zero crossing; single frequency; topology unchanged; source-range overlap
allowed_claim: Mention as a future method if the thesis discusses transient extensions.
blocked_or_future_condition: No startup, zero crossing, branch reversal, irregular oscillation, or persistent exchange application.

thesis_role: Future surrogate/ROM lane if full-order snapshot ensemble exists
required_gates: FOM verification; snapshot coverage; retained energy/mode criterion; conservation checks; held-out validation; extrapolation detector
allowed_claim: Mention as future capability for fast interpolation within a verified envelope.
blocked_or_future_condition: No predictive accuracy claim without verified FOM and held-out validation.
